name: Fight StickMan
description: Stick Fighter is a fighting game where you take control of one six characters, all of whom have completely different move sets! Run the gauntlet in the single player mode taking on each of the other characters in an attempt to prove yourself as the ultimate Stick Fighter!
instructions: Move Jump - A D or Left Right arrow keys Attack 1 - A A or Left Left Attack 2 - D D or Right Right Double Jump 1 - A D or Left Right Double Jump 2 - D A or Right Left Attack 3 - While double-jumping A or Left Atta
